tokens: Apollo 16 Flight Journal - Index PageThe Apollo 16 Flight JournalDavid Woods and Tim BrandtWelcome to this 2 May 2025 release of theApollo 16 Flight Journal, part of theApollo Flight Journalseries.Like its companion, theApollo Lunar Surface Journal, it is intended to be a resource for all those interested in the Apollo program, whether in a passing or scholarly capacity.This journal covers the flight of Apollo 16, eventually from launch to splashdown.

As aliving document, it will continue to grow and evolve and major changes will be intimated in the appropriate internet groups.Journals for other Apollo flights are available at theAFJ Portal.Mission SummaryTravelling from the Earth to the MoonDay 1: Launch and Ascent to Earth OrbitDay 1: First Earth OrbitDay 1: Second Earth Orbit and Trans-Lunar InjectionDay 1: Transposition, Docking and ExtractionDay 1: Translunar CruiseDay 2: Electrophoresis Experiment and Midcourse Correction BurnDay 2: LM Entry and ChecksDay 3: ALFMED ExperimentDay ...
